news_items.headline: Goodman hits 3 HRs, knocks in 5 as Rockies win
news_items.summary: Colorado Rockies designated hitter Hunter Goodman hit three long home runs in an 8-5 victory over the Minnesota Twins on Saturday, a day after he launched a two-out, two-run homer in the ninth inning of the series opener.

news_items.headline: Mozeliak eyes short, long view as Halos interim GM...
news_items.summary: John Mozeliak has a lengthy to-do list as interim general manager for the Angels, but the hiring of a new manager to replace Kurt Suzuki is not among his priorities.

news_items.headline: Royals' Ragans to have elbow surgery Wednesday
news_items.summary: Royals left-hander Cole Ragans will undergo elbow surgery Wednesday that will determine the degree of repair needed, manager Matt Quatraro said Saturday.

news_items.headline: Cubs put reliever Milner on IL with appendicitis
news_items.summary: The Cubs injury-riddled pitching staff suffered another blow when left-handed reliever Hoby Milner was placed on the 15-day injured list on Saturday with appendicitis and right-hander Tyler Ferguson was recalled from Triple-A Iowa.

news_items.headline: Reinsdorf officiates Kittle's wedding at ChiSox ga...
news_items.summary: As the White Sox were slugging their way to a 22-1 victory over the Royals on Friday night, former player Ron Kittle was getting married in a ballpark suite with Chicago chairman Jerry Reinsdorf officiating.

news_items.headline: Bassitt has back surgery; O's hopeful for '26 retu...
news_items.summary: Orioles pitcher Chris Bassitt opted to have surgery on his back, and the team is hopeful he'll be able to return before the end of the season.

news_items.headline: Braves fall to Giants as Bryce Elder gets shelled again
news_items.summary: On May 22, Bryce Elder completed six innings against the Washington Nationals to lower his ERA on the season to 1.97. His FIP sat at a reasonable 3.31 and even his 3.84 xFIP was totally palatable. Flash forward to Saturday night — a span of six starts — and after surrendering five more runs to […]
